# Napnix (Napix)

> Napnix — also commonly searched as Napix — is an India-based software development company building custom web applications, mobile apps, cloud infrastructure, AI/ML solutions, NapCRM, and NapMail.

Napnix specializes in end-to-end digital product development for startups and enterprises. Founded in 2020, headquartered in IT Park Sector 67, Mohali, Punjab, India. Core expertise: React, Node.js, Flutter, AWS, AI/ML. Contact: info@napnix.in | +91 7009614671.

## Products

- [NapCRM](https://napnix.in/napcrm): Industry-specific CRM platform with lead management, e-commerce tools, automation, and multi-channel communication. Plans from ₹999/month (Starter) to ₹5,999/month (Business), plus custom Enterprise tier.
- [NapCRM Pricing](https://napnix.in/napcrm/pricing): Detailed feature comparison across Starter, Growth, Business, and Enterprise plans with yearly discount options.
- [NapMail](https://napnix.in/napmail): Email marketing engine with smart SMTP rotation, anti-spam scoring (50+ checks), per-domain throttling, visual automation builder, and NapCRM integration. Free plan (1K contacts, 5K emails/mo), paid plans from ₹699/month to ₹4,999/month, plus custom Enterprise.

## Services

- [Custom Web Development](https://napnix.in/services/custom-web-development): Full-stack web application development — React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, cloud-native architectures.
- [Mobile App Development](https://napnix.in/services/mobile-app-development): iOS, Android, and cross-platform apps using Flutter and React Native.
- [E-commerce Development](https://napnix.in/services/ecommerce-development): Shopify, WooCommerce, headless commerce, and custom marketplace platforms.
- [Cloud Solutions](https://napnix.in/services/cloud-solutions): AWS, Azure, GCP infrastructure, DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, containerization.
- [AI & Machine Learning](https://napnix.in/services/ai-machine-learning): Custom AI models, NLP, computer vision, predictive analytics, and ML pipeline development.

## NapCRM Industry Solutions

- [CRM for E-commerce](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/ecommerce): Abandoned cart recovery, product catalog sync, order tracking, customer segmentation.
- [CRM for Real Estate](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/realestate): Property listing management, lead scoring, site visit scheduling, document management.
- [CRM for Healthcare](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/healthcare): Patient management, appointment scheduling, HIPAA-compliant communication, treatment tracking.
- [CRM for Education](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/education): Student enrollment tracking, course management, parent communication, fee tracking.
- [CRM for Hospitality](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/hospitality): Reservation management, guest profiles, loyalty programs, review management.
- [CRM for Restaurants](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/restaurant): Table reservation, menu management, delivery integration, customer loyalty.
- [CRM for Salons & Spas](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/salon): Appointment booking, stylist scheduling, membership management, product inventory.
- [CRM for Fitness](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/fitness): Member management, class scheduling, trainer assignments, attendance tracking.
- [CRM for Travel](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/travel): Itinerary management, booking workflows, traveler profiles, supplier coordination.
- [CRM for Legal](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/legal): Case management, client intake, document management, billing and time tracking.
- [CRM for Manufacturing](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/manufacturing): Order management, inventory tracking, supplier relations, quality control.
- [CRM for Logistics](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/logistics): Shipment tracking, fleet management, route optimization, warehouse management.
- [CRM for Service Businesses](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/services): Project tracking, client communication, invoicing, team collaboration.
- [CRM for Small Business](https://napnix.in/napcrm/industries/general): Contact management, deal pipeline, task automation, email campaigns.

## Local Presence

- [Software Development in Mohali](https://napnix.in/software-development-company/mohali): HQ-based custom software, CRM, mobile, and AI delivery for Punjab and Tricity businesses.
- [Software Development in Chandigarh](https://napnix.in/software-development-company/chandigarh): Web, mobile, CRM, and AI solutions for Chandigarh startups and enterprises.

## Blog

- [Top 10 AI Trends Shaping Business in 2026](https://napnix.in/blog/ai-trends-2026): Analysis of AI trends transforming enterprise software — from agentic AI to multimodal systems.
- [Cost of Building a Custom CRM in 2026](https://napnix.in/blog/cost-of-custom-crm-2026): Detailed breakdown of CRM development costs, timelines, and build-vs-buy analysis.
- [React Native vs Flutter 2026](https://napnix.in/blog/react-native-vs-flutter): Technical comparison of cross-platform mobile frameworks — performance, ecosystem, and use cases.
- [Monolith to Microservices Migration Guide](https://napnix.in/blog/monolith-to-microservices): Step-by-step guide to decomposing monolithic applications into microservices architecture.
- [Why Your Business Needs a PWA](https://napnix.in/blog/why-business-needs-pwa): Benefits of Progressive Web Apps — offline support, performance, and installation.
